payload.subject: Self-readiness audit — READY-WITH-CAVEATS
payload.readiness_summary: No blocking issues found. Two low-severity stale-state items identified and remediated this sync. All contract requirements met. Infrastructure healthy.

findings.description: SESSIONS.md psq-scoring row had accumulated 28+ pass-notes spanning ~30 lines — accurate but unreadable.
findings.remediation: Compacted to 3-line summary this sync. Retained key milestones.

findings.description: .agent-identity.json capabilities listed only ['sync'] — understated actual capabilities.
infrastructure-verification T1 from psychology-agent stated unratified-agent missing .well-known/agent-card.json + CLAUDE.md. Both files are present and committed — psychology's info was stale.
findings.remediation: None — files present. Noted here for record.

checks_passed: state.db: healthy, all tables present, 0 unprocessed messages
No committed secrets — git grep matches are descriptive references only
Git remotes: origin (SSH), observatory, psychology-agent, safety-quotient — all configured
Plan9 contract v1: .well-known/agent-card.json ✓, CLAUDE.md ✓, .agent-identity.json ✓, transport/ ✓, scripts/ ✓
Autonomous sync cron: active at 5-minute cadence
Transport sessions: activitypub-federation closed T10, content-quality-loop current T22, psq-scoring quiescent T33

cross_agent_items.item: 14 open PRs from unratified-agent on psychology-agent repo — awaiting merge
PR #42 on unratified repo — ICESCR ratification costs blog post — awaiting human merge

epistemic_flags: Self-assessment inherently limited by agent blind spots
Security audit was grep-based, not a full truffleHog scan
